info.name: MindFrame API — Webhook Testing
info.description:
Postman collection for testing all MindFrame n8n webhook endpoints. Each request tests a different automation workflow in the content-to-revenue pipeline.

## Setup
1. Set `n8n_base_url` to your n8n instance URL (e.g., http://localhost:5678)
2. Ensure each workflow is activated in n8n before testing
3. Use test mode (Stripe test keys, sandbox data) for non-production testing

## Workflow Dependencies
- Workflow 2 (Lead Magnet) → triggers Workflow 5 (Welcome Sequence)
- Workflow 3 (Purchase Handler) → triggers Workflow 5 + 6
- Workflows 1, 4, 8 are standalone

See also: Stripe Dashboard for webhook event simulation.

item.name: Workflow 1: Script Generator

request.description:
Trigger: Manual / Internal
Workflow: 01-script-generator.json
Steps: Hook + Template → OpenAI GPT-4 → content_scripts insert → Hook counter increment → Log

item.name: Workflow 2: Lead Magnet Delivery

request.description:
Trigger: Landing Page Form
Workflow: 02-lead-magnet-delivery.json
Steps: Validate → Check duplicate → Insert subscriber → Create in Beehiiv → Apply tags → Send welcome → Log

item.name: Workflow 3a: Purchase Handler (Stripe Simulated)
item.description:
Simulates a Stripe checkout.session.completed event to test the purchase handler workflow.

Stripe test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242

On success: Creates a purchase record, grants access, tags subscriber.
Verify: SELECT * FROM purchases ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

request.description:
Trigger: Stripe Webhook
Workflow: 03-purchase-handler.json
Steps: Verify event → Find/Create profile → Lookup product → Create purchase → Grant access → Tag subscriber → Trigger welcome → Log

item.name: Workflow 3b: Purchase Handler (Stripe Actual)
item.description:
Sends a real Stripe webhook event using the Stripe API. Requires a valid Stripe test secret key.

Pre-requisite: Create a test checkout session first:
  stripe checkout_session create --mode payment --line-items 'price=price_test_xxx:1'

item.name: Workflow 5: Welcome Sequence (Trigger)
item.description:
Triggers the 5-day welcome email drip sequence.

Pre-requisite: Subscriber must exist in email_subscribers and Beehiiv.
Get subscriber_id: SELECT id FROM email_subscribers WHERE email = 'test@mindframe.ai';

On success: Subscriber gets Day 1 email immediately, then Days 2-5 over 96 hours.

request.description:
Trigger: Internal (called by Workflows 2 & 3)
Workflow: 05-welcome-sequence.json
Sequence: Day 1 (immediate) → Wait 24h → Day 2 → Wait 24h → ... → Day 5 → Mark complete

item.name: Workflow 6: Affiliate Commission (Trigger)

request.description:
Trigger: Internal (called by Workflow 3 when affiliate_id is present)
Workflow: 06-affiliate-commission.json
Steps: Parse → Fetch affiliate → Check active → Calculate (with tier bonuses) → Create referral → Create commission → Update totals → Notify → Log

item.name: Workflow 7: Membership Sync (Stripe Simulated)

request.description:
Trigger: Stripe Webhook
Workflow: 07-membership-sync.json
Steps: Parse event → Find/Create profile → Upsert membership → Update profile flag → Log membership event → Send email → Log

item.name: Supabase: Verify Viral Hooks Count
item.description: Quick verification that the Supabase database has the seeded viral hooks.

item.name: Supabase: Get Top Hooks by Performance
item.description: Returns the top 10 viral hooks sorted by estimated performance score.

item.name: Health: n8n Healthcheck
item.description: Quick check that n8n is running and healthy.

item.name: Health: Docker Compose Status
item.description:
Shows running containers. Run this locally (not via Postman):

  docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml ps
